parts.prompt:
Create ONE snake skin part for the same exact snake character.
Reference image 1 is style anchor. Reference image 2 is strict geometry lock.
Rules:
- Keep exact contour, exact facing, exact proportions from reference image 2.
- Keep transparent background and same canvas size.
- Reuse same material language and palette family from reference image 1.
- Keep candy-crush-like glossy jelly rendering, with clear highlights.
- Prefer smooth solid candy shading over segmented/internal geometric patterns.
- Keep smooth surface; no scales, no hex pattern, no geometric tessellation.
- Preserve readability under hue shifts (future in-game variants).
Part: snake_head (neutral expression).
Expression/material note: neutral face only; keep all materials/colors locked to style anchor.
Hard negatives:
- no palette drift
- no saturation drift between parts
- no contour protrusions
- no long neck
- no background
